zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Jesse於1645年3月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德時，她的父親William Jesse26歲，母親Susanna22歲。她於1664年1月18日與James Wright在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1707年5月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年62歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓布里奇 史崔特 其特利。

meanings: English: variant of   Jesse  , pronounced as two syllables. This surname is most common in VA.

variants.name: Jessel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Heinz.

English: perhaps a variant of Chessell with voicing of initial /ʧ/ to /ʤ/, spelled J-. This is a habitational name, either from Chesthill, a lost place in Moreton Say and Stoke upon Tern (Shropshire) or from Chessell, Freshwater (Isle of Wight). Both placenames are spelled as Chesthull in medieval records but the Shropshire name is thought to refer to a hill (Old English hyll) where parish boundaries were disputed (the first element is Old English ceast ‘strife, contention’), whereas the Isle of Wight name refers to a hill where burial chests or coffins were found (the first element is Old English cest ‘chest’), probably referring to the 6th-century pagan cemetery on Chessell Down.

variants.name: Kaspar
meanings: German; Czech and Slovak (Kašpar); Slovenian and Sorbian (also Kašpar): from the personal names Kaspar (German) and Kašpar (Czech and Sorbian; also a variant of Slovak Gašpar and Slovenian Gašper), equivalents of Casper . See also Kasper , Gaspar , and Gasper .

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

historicEvents.description: Oldest grave seen in the memorial list

Bridge Street Cemetery is located at 156 Bridge Street (Route 9) in Northampton next Lampron Park and the Bridge Street Elementary School.  Established in 1661, it is the oldest cemetery in Northampton.  The City of Northampton oversees the cemetery.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Jesse was born on 1 March 1645, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, William Jesse, was 26 and her mother, Susanna, was 22. She married James Wright on 18 January 1664, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 24 May 1707, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 62, and was buried in Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States.

ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Jesse(이)가 1645년 3월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Jesse(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Susanna(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1664년 1월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 James Wright(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1707년 5월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴 브리지 스트릿 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Jesse nasceu em 1 de março de 1645, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Jesse, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Susanna, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com James Wright em 18 de janeiro de 1664, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de maio de 1707, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Bridge Street Cemetery, Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Jesse родилась 1 марта 1645 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени William Jesse было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Wright 18 января 1664 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 24 мая 1707 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности бридж стрит кеметири, нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.
